name: flutter-ultra-mcp
description: The ultimate Flutter MCP plugin — 8 specialized servers, 214 tools, cross-platform automation for Claude Code

plugins.name: flutter
plugins.description: Durable cross-platform Flutter automation via 8 specialized MCP servers, in-app mixin binding, and an optional DevTools panel. Replaces marionette_mcp and the official dart mcp-server for Claude Code.
